description: Create a four-column timeline slide on future AI applications with milestone years and text callouts in a content layout.

header.headline: Increasing amounts of data allow continuous optimization of artificial intelligence – Possible future applications could transform lives

steps.label: Healthcare
steps.sub: AI will be used to address and prevent health problems through tools such as advanced AI prediction applications, virtual nursing assistants and smart wearable devices that detect health issues when they occur, reducing unnecessary hospitalizations

steps.label: Trust, ethics & governance
steps.sub: Organizations will be required to provide transparent reports on how they govern and assure their ethical use of AI and data; they will be held responsible for breaches of trust

steps.label: Sustainable business
steps.sub: AI will make it possible for businesses to run a carbon-neutral enterprise from 2030 to 2040

steps.label: Service innovation
steps.sub: AI technology will read emotions to personalize each customer experience, and everyday interactions will be a mix of humans, AI-enabled machines and hybrids
